title: Wait & Hold Experience
lede: Control the audio a caller hears while waiting for a human — during the ring, while queued, and when an agent presses Hold. Upload music and add spoken periodic messages.

steps.title: Open the Wait & Hold experience tab
steps.content:
1. Go to Call Center → Contact Center → Groups and select a group.
  2. Open the Wait & Hold experience tab.

images.caption: Wait & Hold: wait music, periodic messages, and hold music.
Wait & Hold: wait music, periodic messages, and hold music.

steps.title: Decide what plays during the ring
steps.content:
Use Play wait audio during the initial group ring to choose what the caller hears while the group is being rung:

  • Off — normal phone ringing (default).
  • Only when a member is online.
  • Always — even if nobody is online.

Turning it on answers the call early so your wait music and messages play instead of ringing — note the call connects (and bills) from that moment.

steps.title: Add wait music and periodic messages
steps.content:
1. Switch on Wait music and Upload wait music (or paste an audio URL). Use a short loop; the limit is 10 MB.
  2. Switch on Periodic messages to speak short lines on a loop while the caller waits. Add several — they play in order, each after its interval.
  3. Set each message's interval as a single number (for example 30) or a range like 15-45 for a random wait. Tokens like {first_name} are filled in for the call.

steps.title: Set hold music
steps.content: Switch on Hold music and upload a track (or paste a URL). This plays to the caller when an agent presses Hold during a live call. Click Save when finished.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Decide what happens when the wait runs long.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:

metaDescription: Set the hold music, wait music, and spoken periodic messages a caller hears while queued or on hold for a Contact Center group in iMash.
metaKeywords: hold music, wait music, periodic messages, greeting, queue audio, contact center, permission group
